revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: using format used across wikipedia now
revision.text:
{| align="center" class="boilerplate" id="disambig" style="width: 95%; background: #edf3fe; border: 1px solid #aaaa88; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 10px 0 10px; text-align: left;" |- | '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page listing articles with similar or identical names.'''
If you arrived here following a link in another article, you might want go back and fix that link to point to the appropriate specific page listed here. |} [[Category:Disambiguation]]

AngMoh literary in local Singlish or Hokkien means red hairy (red Harry!) It means a westerner. and it's a person not a monkey like Ole Harry! also AngMo see westerners Sarong Party Girl like ang moh a lot! return to [[1] (http://www.sgwiki.com/wiki/Main.htm)] I recognize itz nt da case fer all women but at least im one who appreciates caucasian men! they are da best kind of men arnd.. due to da following reasons.. i shall tell ya. 10. they look more presentable, most of them dont go around wearing slippers {f :false} 9. they have basic table manners, unlike some ah bengs (not all Ahs bing neither all r AM or r so kind) 8. most of them converse fluently in english (try figuring out some in UK, I bet my boots U don't understand!) 7. they are open-minded (who's not?) 6. they are generous and willing to part with their money ( got to see to believe!) 5. they are taller and more muscular than most asians, thus greater sense of security 1 for AM Sporeans 5 >10 3. they know how to please women and are romantic eh! by someone< bout au revior >on chat line [[2] (http://buses.sgforums.com/?action=thread_display&thread_id=155860)] My opinion is not found here but that POV by chatline User:bout au revior is certainly prejudiced! Anyone who know AngMohs will tell you that size and race matters so little, and that little is what some people think is so great! I lived in America and stayed long enough to know waht's the big deal in those 10 points

revision.comment: It's tricky to tweak this template's wording, but I believe that this is an improvement. It should be noted that some disambiguation pages contain more than links, so the wording should be inclusive.

revision.comment: Updated to use {{dmbox}}, and made so it only categorises in main space.
Added the image alternate text "Disambiguation notice".
Adding extended categorising function, tested in /sandbox and /testcases. Per editprotected request by Kotniski.
to reflect new location of dabcat

Clean-up. MSGJ: Physical line breaks after
tags cause MediaWiki to add extra padding and extra paragraph breaks under some circumstances. It didn't here, but would if/when we add more text.
Forwarding "nocat" to {{dmbox}} so "nocat=true" can be used to suppress categorisation when just demonstrating or testing this template.
add cat per talk page request
extend comment, in response to confused readers

Enhanced message:"(qualifier) articles associated with the title {{PAGENAME}}". Populate [[Category:Disambiguation pages with (qualified) titles]]. See [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Include article name in explanation]].
Sync from sandbox. Implement {{{ignore_parentheses}}} and {{{type}}} parameters
populate [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]] with dab pages whose talk pages are redirects
change text displayed on template disambiguation pages, per [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Template disambiguation pages]]
categorize in disambiguation pages with short description
outsource short description definition for disambiguations to template (no functional change)

get [[Wikipedia:Village pump (all)]] out of [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]]. I think [[special:permalink/843408403#Making widely-used icons consistent and modern|Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)#Making widely-used icons consistent and modern]] put it there.
remove redundant space, per request at [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Template-protected edit request on 1 June 2019]]
allow for specification of sort order for hn

revision.comment: change div to font to avoid side effect in Cologne Blue skin
revision.text: <font class="boilerplate" id="disambig">''This is a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page; that is, one that points to other pages that might otherwise have the same name. If you followed a link here, you might want to go back and fix that link to point to the appropriate specific page.''</font>[[Category:Disambiguation]]

revision.comment: using format used across wikipedia now
revision.text:
{| align="center" class="boilerplate" id="disambig" style="width: 95%; background: #edf3fe; border: 1px solid #aaaa88; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 10px 0 10px; text-align: left;" |- | '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page listing articles with similar or identical names.'''
If you arrived here following a link in another article, you might want go back and fix that link to point to the appropriate specific page listed here. |} [[Category:Disambiguation]]

revision.comment: +, ; + "that might otherwise have the same name"
revision.text:
{| align="center" class="boilerplate" id="disambig" style="width: 95%; background: #edf3fe; border: 1px solid #aaaa88; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 10px 0 10px; text-align: left;" |- | '''This is a [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page, listing articles with similar or identical names that might otherwise have the same name.'''
If you arrived here following a link in another article, you might want go back and fix that link to point to the appropriate specific page listed here. |} [[Category:Disambiguation]]

AngMoh literary in local Singlish or Hokkien means red hairy (red Harry!) It means a westerner. and it's a person not a monkey like Ole Harry! also AngMo see westerners Sarong Party Girl like ang moh a lot! return to [[1] (http://www.sgwiki.com/wiki/Main.htm)] I recognize itz nt da case fer all women but at least im one who appreciates caucasian men! they are da best kind of men arnd.. due to da following reasons.. i shall tell ya. 10. they look more presentable, most of them dont go around wearing slippers {f :false} 9. they have basic table manners, unlike some ah bengs (not all Ahs bing neither all r AM or r so kind) 8. most of them converse fluently in english (try figuring out some in UK, I bet my boots U don't understand!) 7. they are open-minded (who's not?) 6. they are generous and willing to part with their money ( got to see to believe!) 5. they are taller and more muscular than most asians, thus greater sense of security 1 for AM Sporeans 5 >10 3. they know how to please women and are romantic eh! by someone< bout au revior >on chat line [[2] (http://buses.sgforums.com/?action=thread_display&thread_id=155860)] My opinion is not found here but that POV by chatline User:bout au revior is certainly prejudiced! Anyone who know AngMohs will tell you that size and race matters so little, and that little is what some people think is so great! I lived in America and stayed long enough to know waht's the big deal in those 10 points

'''Xmas'''
''This is a [[Wikipedia:disambiguation|disambiguation]] page—a list of articles associated with the same title. If an [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|internal link]] referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.''

revision.comment: Updated to use {{dmbox}}, and made so it only categorises in main space.
Added the image alternate text "Disambiguation notice".
Adding extended categorising function, tested in /sandbox and /testcases. Per editprotected request by Kotniski.
to reflect new location of dabcat

Clean-up. MSGJ: Physical line breaks after
tags cause MediaWiki to add extra padding and extra paragraph breaks under some circumstances. It didn't here, but would if/when we add more text.
Forwarding "nocat" to {{dmbox}} so "nocat=true" can be used to suppress categorisation when just demonstrating or testing this template.
add cat per talk page request
extend comment, in response to confused readers

Enhanced message:"(qualifier) articles associated with the title {{PAGENAME}}". Populate [[Category:Disambiguation pages with (qualified) titles]]. See [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Include article name in explanation]].
Sync from sandbox. Implement {{{ignore_parentheses}}} and {{{type}}} parameters
populate [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]] with dab pages whose talk pages are redirects
change text displayed on template disambiguation pages, per [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Template disambiguation pages]]
categorize in disambiguation pages with short description
outsource short description definition for disambiguations to template (no functional change)

get [[Wikipedia:Village pump (all)]] out of [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]]. I think [[special:permalink/843408403#Making widely-used icons consistent and modern|Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)#Making widely-used icons consistent and modern]] put it there.
remove redundant space, per request at [[Template talk:Disambiguation#Template-protected edit request on 1 June 2019]]
allow for specification of sort order for hn

merge namespace detection from sandbox - seemed to work with the testcases, and I couldn't find issues - if there is any problem feel free to revert or edit request/ping me immediately

{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Disambiguation page short description}}}} {{Dmbox | type = disambig | text = {{#switch: {{{nsoverride|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}| | #default = This [[Help:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page lists {{{type|{{#if:{{{ignore_parentheses|}}}||{{Title disambig text|1={{Str rep|{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|(disambiguation)|}}}}}}}}} {{namespace detect|main=articles|category=categories|wikipedia=project pages|template=templates|other=pages}} associated with the title '''{{#if:{{{ignore_parentheses|}}}|{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE|{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}'''. | Wikipedia = This page is a list of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project pages]] associated with the same title or shortcut.{{Category handler|wikipedia=[[Category:Wikipedia disambiguation pages]]|nocat={{{nocat|}}}}} | MOS = This page is a list of [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Wikipedia Manual of Style pages or sections]] associated with the same title or shortcut.[[Category:Manual of Style disambiguation pages]] | Portal = This page is a list of [[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|portals]] associated with the same title.{{Category handler|portal=[[Category:Portal disambiguation pages]]|nocat={{{nocat|}}}}} }}
{{main other | demospace = {{{demospace|}}} | If an [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|namespace=0}} internal link] led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article. | If an [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}} internal link] led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended page. }} | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} }}{{main other | demospace = {{{demospace|}}} | [[Category:Disambiguation pages]]{{disambiguation/cat|{{{1|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{2|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{3|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{4|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{5|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{6|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{7|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{8|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{9|}}}}}{{disambiguation/cat|{{{10|}}}}}{{#if: {{{hn|}}} | [[Category:Human name disambiguation pages|{{{hn}}}]] }}{{#if:{{Title disambig text|1={{Str rep|{{FULLPAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)|}}}}|[[Category:Disambiguation pages with (qualified) titles]]|}} | }}{{main other|{{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|[[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]]}}}}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]
